0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is installed as a Python package and registered with your Hermes agent. This page walks through every step — from prerequisites to verification."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Before installing Mnemosyne, make sure you have:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}]," — check with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent"}]," already installed and initialized at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/hermes-agent/"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pip"}]," or ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"uv"}]," package manager available in your shell"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Don't have Hermes yet?"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you haven't set up Hermes Agent, do that first. Mnemosyne is a plugin that runs ",["$","em",null,{"children":"inside"}]," the Hermes ecosystem — it won't work as a standalone tool without it."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Quick Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Three commands. That's all it takes."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 1 — Activate the Hermes virtual environment:"}]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Required step"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["You ",["$","em",null,{"children":"must"}]," activate the venv before running pip. Without it, the package installs into the wrong Python environment and Hermes won't find it."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 2 — Install the package:"}]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 3 — Register with Hermes:"}]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["This creates the plugin symlink and updates ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," so Hermes knows about Mnemosyne."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Install Options"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"pip vs uv"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Both work. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]," is faster:"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Standard pip\npip install mnemosyne-memory\n\n# uv (recommended for speed)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Extras"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships optional dependency groups you can install as needed:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Core"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Base package with FTS5 full-text search"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ LLM provider integrations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":["$L4","$L5","$L6"]}],"$L7"]}]]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a"],["$L1b"],"$L1c"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"2dQ5KqP-HsPKzUBBlSLdX"}
4:["$","td",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]
5:["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}]
6:["$","td",null,{"children":"+ Embedding model support"}]
7:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All optional dependencies"}]]}]
8:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:10:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"The core install is fully functional for FTS5-based memory search. You only need the extras if your workflow requires LLM-powered consolidation or dedicated embedding providers."}]}]]}]]}]}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Verify Installation"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the stats command through Hermes to confirm everything is wired up:"}]
b:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["You should see a summary of memory tiers and database status. If the command is not found, the registration step may have failed — re-run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.install"}],"."]}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can also verify the Python package directly:"}]
e:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"","language":"bash"}]
f:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Useful Hermes Commands"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Once installed, these are the Mnemosyne commands available through Hermes:"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne stats"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show memory statistics"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne version"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show installed version"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne inspect [query]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Search memories interactively"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run consolidation (sleep cycle)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne export --output <path>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Export memories to JSON"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne import --input <path>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Import memories from JSON"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory setup"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Interactive provider picker (curses UI)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory status"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show current memory provider config"}]]}]]}]]}]
12:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Common mistake"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Do ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes plugin install mnemosyne"}]," — that command doesn't exist. The correct Hermes plugin commands are ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes plugins install <git-url>"}]," (note the plural ",["$","em",null,{"children":"plugins"}],"), which expects a Git repository URL. Mnemosyne is installed via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip"}]," and registered with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.install"}],", not through the plugin manager."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
13:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Vector Search"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5"}]," (full-text search) by default, which works out of the box with no extra dependencies. If you want ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"semantic vector search"}],", you can optionally install sqlite-vec:"]}]
15:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install sqlite-vec","language":"bash"}]
16:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"FTS5 works great on its own"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["sqlite-vec is entirely optional. Without it, Mnemosyne gracefully falls back to FTS5-only mode — all ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall"}]," operations still work. Add sqlite-vec only if you need vector similarity in addition to text search."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
17:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're contributing or want to run the latest unreleased changes:"}]
19:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Activate the Hermes venv first\nsource ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate\n\n# Clone the repo\ngit clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Install in editable mode with dev dependencies\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n\n# Register with Hermes\npython -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}]
1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:10:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Editable mode"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — changes to the source code take effect immediately without re-installing. Perfect for development and debugging."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
1b:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true}]
1c:["$","$L1d",null,{"children":["$","$1e",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@1f"}]}]
